amazon_choice._analysis: Amazon Choice badge appeared today. Likely keyword: 'wireless cat water fountain' or 'cat water fountain stainless steel' based on title match. Triggered by combination of: (1) Title change EXP-019 Apr 11 — 'Wireless Cat Water Fountain, 30-Day Battery Life, Stainless Steel Tray' improved keyword relevance. (2) Backend keywords EXP-028 Apr 11 — added high-SV gap terms improving indexing. (3) BSR breakthrough 105,671 — sub-110K triggers Amazon Choice eligibility in this subcategory. (4) 4.5 stars with FBA = all technical requirements met.
_how_to_maintain: Do NOT change the title — EXP-019 title is actively earning the badge. Stability matters.
Keep FBA in stock — 373 units is fine. Amazon Choice requires consistent availability.
Maintain 4.5+ star rating — get reviews from Dee (Apr 12) and today's buyers ASAP.
Maintain competitive price — $49.99. Do not raise price while badge is active.
Keep PPC running — ad activity signals Amazon that the listing is being actively managed.
Do NOT run any listing experiments that change the title until Wave 3 is fully planned.
BSR must stay sub-200K — maintain 1+ sale every 2-3 days to hold BSR level.
